arts.ttl: Former Marseille, Roma and PSV midfielder Kevin Strootman announces retirement from football
arts.sum: Kevin Strootman has officially called time on his career aged 34. The 46-time Netherlands international experienced successful spells with the likes of Marseille, Roma, PSV Eindhoven and Genoa, among other…

arts.ttl: Genoa President Zangrillo: “Attacking Gilardino is disgraceful, we will recover”
arts.sum: Genoa president Alberto Zangrillo, has spoken out about the club’s current difficulties, addressing issues ranging from the team’s performance to rumors of a potential sale. In a candid interview with La Gazzetta dello Sport, Zangrillo defended manager Alberto Gilardino and called for unity within the organization. Regarding the team’s challenging start to the season, Zangrillo stated, “Yes, I expected it because anything can happen in football, and looking at the calendar, I had taken it into account.
